case_title: PANHANDLE COLLECTIONS, INC. VS. CHRISTOPHER MARQUEZ

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF PANHANDLE COLLECTIONS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MARQUEZ, CHRISTOPHER JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PANHANDLE COLLECTIONS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARQUEZ, CHRISTOPHER $2,014.17 PRINCIPAL, $467.54 INTEREST, $7.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,488.71, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
